wordplay_note: A field voice shouting from the margins
card_description: Stuart Hadley (meaning "Hadley = heather field") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Voices from the Street*. Young TV salesman in postwar Oakland struggling with existential rage. Name note: A field voice shouting from the margins. The angry young man — PKD's portrait of postwar American disillusionment. First appears in *Voices from the Street*.

reference.brief: Young TV salesman in postwar Oakland struggling with existential rage
reference.significance: The angry young man — PKD's portrait of postwar American disillusionment
